assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle V2 Mentor opening exchange persistence persists a question opener before a Yes follow-up in exact order and rehydrates the downstream transcript
assertionResults.title: persists a question opener before a Yes follow-up in exact order and rehydrates the downstream transcript

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle V2 Mentor opening exchange persistence persists a declarative opener as the first canonical exchange
assertionResults.title: persists a declarative opener as the first canonical exchange

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle V2 Mentor opening exchange persistence preserves the opener when subject creation is delayed until after entry
assertionResults.title: preserves the opener when subject creation is delayed until after entry

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle V2 Mentor opening exchange persistence replays a pending opener after retry and restart with one deterministic event pair
assertionResults.title: replays a pending opener after retry and restart with one deterministic event pair

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle V2 Mentor opening exchange persistence adds a missing opener to an already-created session without replacing its raw input
assertionResults.title: adds a missing opener to an already-created session without replacing its raw input

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle V2 Mentor opening exchange persistence hydrates an already-persisted opener and appends later input without duplication
assertionResults.title: hydrates an already-persisted opener and appends later input without duplication

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle POST /v1/subjects/:subjectId/sessions starts a real learning session and records the session_start event
assertionResults.title: starts a real learning session and records the session_start event

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle POST /v1/subjects/:subjectId/sessions returns 403 when the subject is paused
assertionResults.title: returns 403 when the subject is paused

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle POST /v1/subjects/:subjectId/sessions returns 401 without auth
assertionResults.title: returns 401 without auth

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle GET /v1/sessions/:sessionId returns the real persisted session
assertionResults.title: returns the real persisted session

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle GET /v1/sessions/:sessionId returns 404 when the session does not exist
assertionResults.title: returns 404 when the session does not exist

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle POST /v1/sessions/:sessionId/messages processes a real message, persists exchange events, and decrements quota
assertionResults.title: processes a real message, persists exchange events, and decrements quota

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle POST /v1/sessions/:sessionId/messages returns 400 when message is missing
assertionResults.title: returns 400 when message is missing

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle POST /v1/sessions/:sessionId/stream returns SSE output and persists the streamed exchange
assertionResults.title: returns SSE output and persists the streamed exchange

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle POST /v1/sessions/:sessionId/close and summary routes closes the session with pending summary and does not dispatch completion yet
assertionResults.title: closes the session with pending summary and does not dispatch completion yet

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle POST /v1/sessions/:sessionId/close and summary routes submits a learner summary, stores the evaluation, and dispatches completion
assertionResults.title: submits a learner summary, stores the evaluation, and dispatches completion

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle POST /v1/sessions/:sessionId/flag records the content flag event
assertionResults.title: records the content flag event

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle POST /v1/sessions/interleaved starts an interleaved session with real retained topics
assertionResults.title: starts an interleaved session with real retained topics

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle POST /v1/sessions/interleaved returns 400 when there are no retained topics to choose from
assertionResults.title: returns 400 when there are no retained topics to choose from

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle POST /v1/sessions/:sessionId/recall-bridge generates recall questions for a real homework session
assertionResults.title: generates recall questions for a real homework session

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle POST /v1/sessions/:sessionId/recall-bridge returns 400 for non-homework sessions
assertionResults.title: returns 400 for non-homework sessions

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Learning Session Lifecycle POST /v1/sessions/:sessionId/recall-bridge returns 404 when the session does not exist
assertionResults.title: returns 404 when the session does not exist
